landing.eyebrow: Doro anya. Nke enwere ike ịgbaso. Nke a na-apụghị ịgbanwe.
landing.title: Mbọ izizi nke Naịjirịa maka ihe ndị si na ntuli aka ya, nke gbadoro ụkwụ na akwụkwọ.
landing.lede: E wuru ya na Fọm EC8A. Otu ndị mmadụ obodo na-edu ya. Ọ na-aza ajụjụ na ọha mmadụ.
landing.feature1_title: Nkwekọrịta site n'isi mmalite dị iche iche
landing.feature1_body: Ihe ndị si na ntuli aka na-apụta mgbe òtù nọọrọ onwe ha kwekọrịtara.
landing.feature2_body: Nọmba ọ bụla na-egosi ya ya na EC8A nke e debanyere aha.
landing.feature3_body: A na-ahazi onyonyo niile na SHA-256, ihe omume niile na-ejikọta ya, ma Merkle roots dabere na blockchain.

agent.phone_lede: Tinye nọmba ekwentị nke e debanyere aha ya na otu gị.
agent.pu_footnote: Ị ga-eziga naanị maka ebe ntuli aka a. Ọ bụrụ na ị chọrọ ịgbanwe, kpọtụrụ onye nlekọta otu gị.
agent.pu_no_elections: Enweghị ntuli aka na-arụ ọrụ. Kpọtụrụ onye nlekọta otu gị.
agent.capture_lede: Sere foto EC8A niile. Hụ na akụkụ anọ niile na-egosi ma e nwekwara ike ịgụ mbinye aka.
agent.confirm_offline_note: Ọ bụrụ na ị anọghị n'ịntanetị, a ga-ebugo ya na-akpaghị aka mgbe njikọ ịntanetị laghachiri.
agent.done_status_queued: E ziputala. Na-eche onye ọrụ mkpụpụta…
agent.done_queue_remaining_one: Otu nzipụ ka fọdụrụ na kwụ n'ahịrị.
agent.done_queue_remaining_many: Nzipụ {n} ka fọdụrụ na kwụ n'ahịrị.
agent.queue_discard_confirm: Tụfuo nzipụ a? Foto ahụ ga-efu.
agent.err_phone_throttled: Arịrịọ koodu dị ukwuu maka nọmba a.
agent.err_ip_throttled: Arịrịọ koodu dị ukwuu site na netwọk a.
agent.err_no_active_otp: Enweghị koodu na-arụ ọrụ maka nọmba a. Rịọ ọhụrụ.
agent.err_too_many_attempts: Mgbalị ndị ezighi ezi dị ukwuu. Rịọ koodu ọhụrụ.
agent.err_phone_not_provisioned: E debanyebeghị aha nọmba a. Kpọtụrụ onye nlekọta otu gị.
agent.err_device_change_required: Achọpụtala ngwaọrụ ọhụrụ. Onye nlekọta gị ga-akwado.
agent.err_no_pu_assigned: E nyebeghị gị ebe ntuli aka.
agent.err_generic: Ihe na-adịghị mma mere. Biko nwaa ọzọ.
